pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states: 'Create a Data Element Group named "Malaria Testing"' (line 2 of task description)
Task description explicitly states: 'Create a Data Element Group named "Malaria Treatment"' (line 3 of task description)
Task description explicitly states: 'Create a Data Element Group Set named "Malaria Programme Areas"' (line 4 of task description)
Task description explicitly states: 'Save this table as a favorite named "Malaria by Programme Area 2023"' (line 5 of task description)
Task description states requirement: 'add at least 2 data elements related to malaria testing' and 'add at least 2 data elements related to malaria treatment' (task description lines 2-3)
Web search verification: DHIS2 is official free and open-source software used in 75+ countries. Official website: https://dhis2.org/. Wikipedia: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/DHIS2

pi_items.verified_value: Sierra Leone demo database from official DHIS2 project
pi_items.source: Setup script (setup_dhis2.sh) downloads from official source: https://databases.dhis2.org/sierra-leone/2.40/dhis2-db-sierra-leone.sql.gz. File exists and is accessible (verified with curl HTTP 200). Setup script states: 'This is official real-world demo data from the DHIS2 project.'

Web search verification: DHIS2 documentation confirms malaria data elements in Sierra Leone HMIS include 'fever case tested for malaria—positive', 'fever case tested for malaria—negative', with disaggregation by sex, age, and test type (RDT vs microscopy). Source: Search result about Sierra Leone's malaria data collection structure.

pi_items.verified_value: Data Element Group Sets can be configured as dimensions in DHIS2 analytics
pi_items.source: DHIS2 documentation verified via web search: https://docs.dhis2.org/en/use/user-guides/dhis-core-version-241/understanding-the-data-model/about-data-dimensions.html documents how data element group sets function as additional analytical dimensions alongside standard dimensions.
Default credentials specified in setup_dhis2.sh script (ADMIN_USER='admin', ADMIN_PASS='district') and in task description

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real DHIS2 data from the official Sierra Leone demo database hosted by the DHIS2 project at https://databases.dhis2.org/. DHIS2 is a legitimate, widely-deployed open-source health information system used by 75+ countries covering over 40% of the world's population. The Sierra Leone demo contains actual malaria surveillance data with confirmed data elements for malaria testing (RDT and microscopy) by sex, age, and test type. The task requires users to create DHIS2 metadata objects with specific prescribed names: a data element group called 'Malaria Testing', another called 'Malaria Treatment', a group set called 'Malaria Programme Areas' (with data dimension enabled), and a visualization named 'Malaria by Programme Area 2023'. All metadata configuration names in the task match the explicit requirements stated in the task description.
